title: eryngium iranicum
intro: Eryngium iranicum, also known as Iranian eryngo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Eryngium iranicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
